title: Fundraisers
description: Organize activities to raise funds or otherwise solicit and gather monetary donations or other gifts for an organization. May design and produce promotional materials. May also raise awareness of the organization's work, goals, and financial needs.

tasks.text: Identify and build relationships with potential donors.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Secure commitments of participation or donation from individuals or corporate donors.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Write and send letters of thanks to donors.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Solicit cash or in-kind donations or sponsorships from individual, business, or government donors.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Create or update donor databases.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop strategies to encourage new or increased contributions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop or implement fundraising activities, such as annual giving campaigns or direct mail programs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Compile or develop materials to submit to granting or other funding organizations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct research to identify the goals, net worth, charitable donation history, or other data related to potential donors, potential investors, or general donor markets.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop fundraising activity plans that maximize participation or contributions and minimize costs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct or supervise fundraising staff, including volunteer staff members.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Establish fundraising or participation goals for special events or specified time periods.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor progress of fundraising drives.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Recruit sponsors, participants, or volunteers for fundraising events.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Contact corporate representatives, government officials, or community leaders to increase awareness of organizational causes, activities, or needs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Attend community events, meetings, or conferences to promote organizational goals or solicit donations or sponsorships.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Write reports or prepare presentations to communicate fundraising program data.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Explain the tax advantages of contributions to potential donors.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Design or produce materials such as posters, Web sites, or newsletters to promote, market, or advertise fundraising events.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Write speeches, press releases, or other promotional materials to increase awareness of the causes, missions, or goals of organizations seeking funds.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Monitor budgets, expense reports, or other financial data for fundraising organizations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Plan and direct special events for fundraising, such as silent auctions, dances, golf events, or walks.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct or coordinate Web-based fundraising activities, such as online auctions or donation Web sites.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Secure speakers for charitable events, community meetings, or conferences to increase awareness of charitable, nonprofit, or political causes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop corporate fundraising programs, such as employer gift-matching.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Coordinate transportation or delivery of materials, supplies, or donations for fundraising events.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop and maintain media contact lists.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare materials such as fundraising envelopes, bid sheets, or gift bags for charitable events.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
